response.justification: Bogdan brings solid full-stack breadth and genuine high-throughput scale experience from Sociomantic/Dunnhumby, and his recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is technically interesting. However, the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies this Principal-level role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flighting, telemetry pipelines, rollout-risk management, or growth engineering. His current title is Senior rather than Principal/IC6, and there is no demonstrated track record of cross-team architectural leadership, multi-workstream ownership, or building foundational platform capabilities consumed by multiple product teams.
strengths: Genuine high-throughput scale experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async microservices
Broad language proficiency covering most of the required stack (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript) with over 15 years of polyglot development
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq shows adaptability to emerging platform paradigms
concerns: Zero visible experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience — the definitional core of this role
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background; no mention of data analysis, statistical methods, or growth measurement systems
Current title is Senior with no evidence of Principal-level cross-team architectural ownership or multi-workstream technical leadership

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth systems experience
Seniority and leadership gap vs. IC6 expectations
